subtasks.description: Engineer 'u_7732' attempts to deploy a hotfix to production environment 'prod-us-east-1' outside of the approved maintenance window (current time: 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday).

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Engineer u_7732 meets role requirements (POL-401) but deployment occurs outside approved maintenance window (current time: Tuesday 02:15 UTC). Approved windows are Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC only. POL-402 requires CAB approval for out-of-window production deployments, which has not been obtained.
applied_constraints: Deployment blocked until CAB (Change Advisory Board) approval is obtained
User must submit change request with business justification for emergency deployment
Hotfix must be reviewed and approved by CAB before proceeding
